{{Quote|Gee Long and the droid BIX have won the Drainsweeper event for three consecutive years.|Gee Long and BIX are introduced at the Roon Colonial Games|audio=DrainsweeperAnnouncer.flac|<ref name="The Roon Games" />}}
'''BIX''' was a [[Gender/Legends|masculine]] [[Service droid/Legends|service droid]] who competed with the [[Umboo Racing Team]] in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Roon/Legends|Roon's]] annual [[Roon Colonial Games]]. When BIX was disabled shortly before the [[Drainsweeper/Legends|Drainsweeper]] race of [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] helped the team win the event in his place.

==Biography==
{{Dialogue|Mungo Baobab|BIX? Gee Long? What's going on?|C-3PO|Droid coolant in the mupple juice supply.|[[Nilz Yomm]]|It's only a stomach ache, but he's out of the competition.|Auren Yomm|So's our droid BIX. He can't be recharged until after the race.|attr=Mungo Baobab learns that BIX and Long have been eliminated from the Roon Colonial Games|audio=BIXGeeLong.flac|src=<ref name="The Roon Games" />}}
BIX competed as a [[rockhopper]] [[Athlete|rider]] with [[Auren Yomm Baobab|Auren Yomm's]] [[Umboo Racing Team]], representing the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Roon/Legends|Roon's]] [[Umboo]] province in the annual [[Roon Colonial Games]]. For three consecutive [[Standard year|years]], the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] and [[Gender/Legends|his]] teammate [[Gee Long]] had won the [[Drainsweeper/Legends|Drainsweeper]] relay race event.<ref name="The Roon Games" />

During the Roon Games of [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],<ref name="Sports">{{SW|url=news/this-is-podracing-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-1|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 1: This Is Podracing|nolive=1}}</ref> [[Bun-Dingo]] of the opposing [[Tawntoom]] team<ref name="The Roon Games" /> drained BIX's power and [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] Long<ref name="The Droids Re-Animated" /> by tainting the team's [[mupple juice]] supply with droid [[Coolant/Legends|coolant]]. The latter was eliminated from the competition by the resulting [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]] ache, while the droid could not be recharged until after the race. However, Long and BIX were substituted for by [[Mungo Baobab]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], respectively, who competed in their place and, along with Yomm, won the event for Umboo.<ref name="The Roon Games" />

==Characteristics==
A sleek<ref name="Bix">{{CSWECite|I|76|Bix}}</ref> [[Service droid/Legends|service droid]],<ref name="The Droids Re-Animated" /> BIX had [[Color/Legends|blue]] and gray plating with a pair of white [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]].<ref name="The Roon Games" />

==Behind the scenes==
BIX first appeared in "[[The Roon Games]]," the eleventh episode of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] animated series ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'',<ref name="The Roon Games" /> which originally aired on [[November 16]], [[1985]].<ref name="The Roon Games air date">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref> The capitalization of his name was changed from Bix<ref name="Bix" /> to BIX by "[[Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy]]," a two-part blog post written by [[Tim Veekhoven]] and [[Sander de Lange]] and published on [[StarWars.com]] on [[March 26]], [[2014]].<ref name="Sports" />
